zh.Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾阿拉迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville於1203年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾阿拉迪時，他的父親William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness25歲，母親Avice de Lancaster25歲。他於1235年之前與Margaret Crawford在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1249年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾享年46歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville于1203年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾阿拉迪时，他的父亲William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness25岁，母亲Avice de Lancaster25岁。他于1235年之前与Margaret Crawford在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1249年在苏格兰艾斯爾享年46岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville was born in 1203, in Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, was 25 and his mother, Avice de Lancaster, was 25. He married Margaret Crawford before 1235, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1249, in Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 46, and was buried in Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville est né en 1203, à Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Avice de Lancaster, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Crawford avant 1235, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1249, à Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville 1203 in Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness 25 und seine Mutter Avice de Lancaster 25. Er hat vor 1235 in Scotland Margaret Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1249 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville è nato il nel 1203 nel Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Avice de Lancaster, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Crawford prima del 1235, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1249, nel Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Luffness, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアルフネス
ja.Breneville, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア

ja.Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: David de Lindsay Lord of Brenevilleが1203年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアアバーラディで生まれた時，父William de Lindsay Lord of Luffnessは25歳，母Avice de Lancasterは25歳であった。1235年以前にスコットランドでMargaret Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1249年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで46歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville(이)가 1203년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 압를레이디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice de Lancaster(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1235년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1249년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville nasceu em 1203, em Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Avice de Lancaster, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Crawford antes 1235, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1249, em Ayrshire, Scotland, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville родился в 1203 г. в местности абирледи, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice de Lancaster, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Crawford перед 1235 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1249 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville nació en 1203, en Aberlady, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Avice de Lancaster, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Crawford antes de 1235, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1249, en Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Ayrshire, Scotland.
